name: Lemon Cheese Dessert Bombe
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in 2 tablespoons of water.
2. Stir in milk until the gelatin dissolves completely.
3. Combine the cream cheese and sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Mix in the yogurt.
5. Gradually blend in the gelatin mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a 3-cup mold or two 1/2-cup molds.
7. Chill until set, then unmold.
8. Garnish with fresh strawberries or other fruit of your choice.
